message:
perf(widgets): add #[inline] to widget state accessors (bd-2qytc)

Annotate 9 trivial accessors with #[inline]:
- TimerState: duration, remaining, running, finished
- EmojiWidget: text, fallback, width
- ListState: selected, persistence_id
